title: Casual workers payments Kenya: a finance & HR operations guide
excerpt: A practical guide to paying casual workers in Kenya — operational definition, records you must keep, M-Pesa workflow for daily and weekly cycles, statutory touchpoints, reconciliation discipline, and common failure modes. Operations guidance for finance leaders, not legal or tax advice.
meta_title: Casual workers payments Kenya — records, M-Pesa workflow, reconciliation
meta_description: How to pay casual workers in Kenya: the five records you need, an M-Pesa workflow for daily/weekly cycles, statutory touchpoints, reconciliation, and common mistakes.
